Sway_Type_Description: Completely remove / heal a Distract Wound from a Character or Descendant.
Completely remove / heal a Flesh Wound from a Character or Descendant.
Completely remove / heal a Maim Wound from a Character or Descendant, and allow re-purchasing of Maimed Proficiency.
Completely remove / heal a Crippling Wound from a Character or Descendant.
Completely remove / heal a Mortal Wound. Applied Hitches may be converted or lost depending upon the Healing Method.
Completely remove / heal a Carnage Wound. Applied Hitches may be converted or lost depending upon the Healing Method.
Completely remove / heal a Carnage+ Wound. Applied Hitches may be converted or lost depending upon the Healing Method.
